settings.heading: Stitched in North Carolina, washed before it ships.
settings.body: Each Daily Bed is cut from a single roll of flax-linen and sewn by a small workshop in High Point, North Carolina. We pre-wash every cover so the piece you receive feels as soft on day one as it will on day three hundred.

settings.heading: Selected by 2,400+ households.
settings.body: We read every review. Here are the most recent.

settings.title: Has lived in our living room for a year.
settings.body: I'm picky about how things look in our home, and this is the first pet bed that hasn't ruined a corner of a room. Both our cat and our dog claim it. The linen has only gotten softer.
settings.author: Maya R.

settings.title: Worth the price. Fully.
settings.body: We've gone through a half-dozen $50 beds in five years. This is the first one our terrier has not chewed. The cover comes off, the cushion is supportive, and it doesn't smell like plastic.
settings.author: Daniel C.

settings.title: Made for the way we live.
settings.body: Bought a Daily Bowl for our cat, then ended up with two Daily Beds, a Lead, and a Coat. The whole house feels more considered.
settings.author: Priya & Tom

settings.heading: Pairs well with The Daily Bed.
